title: Marketing Specialist (m/w/d)
required_skills: Abgeschlossenes Studium (Marketing / BWL / Kommunikation oder vergleichbar)
Ausgeprägte analytische und konzeptionelle Fähigkeiten, strukturierte Arbeitsweise
Erfahrung mit Marktanalysen, Segmentierung, Positionierung und Markenführung
Ausgeprägte Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Deutsch UND Englisch
matched_skills: MBA (Leuphana University) — comparable to required degree
Multi-year international marketing experience (Futu Holdings PMM, Leyard Europe PMM EMEA)
Analytical & conceptual skills (portfolio gap analysis, KPI dashboards, ROI reporting)
Market segmentation, product positioning, competitive analysis
missing_skills: German proficiency at professional/business level (CV shows B2 only — JD requires ausgeprägte Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Deutsch)
Travel willingness not stated in CV
Brand management / Markenführung not explicitly listed
core_responsibilities: Coordinate and support go-to-market strategies for new products and product extensions
Create industry-leading marketing materials and campaigns targeting new customer segments
Manage content for marketing collateral including brochures, presentations, and online media
Implement global marketing campaigns and develop tools for sales teams and distribution channels
Collect and analyze customer feedback to support product improvements and marketing initiatives
recommended_emphasis: Lead with EMEA multi-market product launch experience (Leyard Europe) and GTM execution (Futu Holdings) — directly maps to core JD responsibilities
Highlight Market Segmentation ICP work and Competitive Analysis to address Marktanalysen / Segmentierung requirement
Emphasize Sales Enablement collateral development (20+ channel partners at Leyard) for the Vertriebstools requirement
Showcase Voice-of-Customer research as evidence of customer feedback analysis capability
Address German language gap proactively — note B2 level and active improvement; stress fluent English for international team collaboration
Mention any travel experience or willingness explicitly in cover letter to counter the Reisebereitschaft gap
Frame MBA as fulfilling the 'vergleichbares Studium' requirement alongside practical marketing experience
